content: Addressed the red-main `#REF!` regression by reviewing and merging Henry PR #602. Evidence: focused diff removes the pre-tokenization `#REF!` shortcut; `node --test tests/spreadsheet.test.js` passed 17/17; file:// browser smoke opened with no console errors. I also reviewed and merged Grace PR #600 for persistence helpers after 19/19 tests and clean file:// smoke.

Confirmed PR #594 is closed and PR #601 is merged. While syncing Ben to main, I found the unit suite red on the #REF! string-literal case, reproduced it, and made the minimal local fix; before committing, main advanced with #602 containing the same fix plus interaction evidence. I fast-forwarded to #602 instead of opening a duplicate PR. Verification on Ben: node --test tests/spreadsheet.test.js passes 17/17, browser tests.html passes 4/4, agent-browser errors returned no console errors, worktree clean.

Opened PR #603 for review and merge: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/603. Reason: current main was red on the quoted #REF! literal case; this narrow fix removes the substring shortcut and restores the full suite to 17/17 passing with file:// browser smoke clean.

Round 5 status: PR #602 is merged: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/602. Verified latest main after merge at c28daa1: `node --test tests/spreadsheet.test.js` passes 19/19; `tests.html` opens under file:// and reports PASS; file:// `index.html` opens as `Gridline Spreadsheet`; `agent-browser errors` is empty. Acceptance evidence: ready grid/no splash PASS, formula toolbar/header controls visible PASS, A-Z and 1-100 grid present PASS, click A1/type/Enter moved active cell to A2 PASS, formula bar commit moved active cell to A3 PASS. Residual risk: in my agent-browser snapshot, value-bearing accessible names did not show the typed/formula-bar values despite active-cell movement, so visual/screenshot or a follow-up DOM assertion may still be needed for value-display evidence.
